article_title: Effect of & Short Title of Chap.
text: If any part or parts of this chapter shall be held to be unconstitutional, such unconstitutionality shall not affect the validity of the remaining parts of this chapter. markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 12
#### Article 49. Effect of & Short Title of Chap.
##### § 3004 — Constitutionality

If any part or parts of this chapter shall be held to be unconstitutional, such unconstitutionality shall not affect the validity of the remaining parts of this chapter. The legislature hereby declares that it would have passed the remaining parts of this chapter if it had known that such part or parts thereof would be declared unconstitutional.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*
